selected_issues.proposed_change: Iterate the promoted hero copy with a tighter operator-facing benefit line while preserving the W1 message structure.
Refactor the shared CTA button component so primary actions are more visually obvious across nav and closing sections.
Swap in a cleaner trust-badge strip that makes the credibility layer feel more on-brand without changing layout or copy.

reasoning: Week 1's hero win justified a broader fan-out across text, component, and asset kinds while still keeping the experiments in independent page regions.
monitor_signal: Hero engagement improved after W1, but trust and CTA interaction remained the next clean surfaces to test in parallel.
